title: Incorrect Error-ENUMVALUE when instantiating a module

features.name: enum typedef with explicit 2-bit logic base type
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with an explicit base type of 2-bit logic
features.snippet: typedef enum logic [1:0] {A, B, C, D} letters;

features.name: enum-typed module parameter with explicit cast default value
features.description: Code should include a module with an enum-typed parameter using explicit cast syntax in its default value
features.snippet: module my_module #(parameter letters LETTER = letters'(0)) (); endmodule

features.name: module instantiation with enum parameter using explicit cast
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an enum parameter is passed using explicit cast syntax
